holdings.infoBox: XOVR is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Spv Exposure To Spacex Lp stock at 19.16%, NVIDIA at 9.95%, Alphabet at 6.91%, Astera Labs at 5.88%, and Meta Platforms at 4.83%.

overview.description: The ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF (XOVR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Entrepreneur 30 index. The fund is interesting. The fund aims to provide exposure to the top 30 US large-cap, most entrepreneurial stocks, either public or private, selected based on very proprietary measurements XOVR was launched on Nov 7, 2017 and is issued by ERShares.
